calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-16-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-16-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Mitch Lyon.
Michael Hall, Esq. for Plaintiff: Edward Bingham Jr. and Merylee Smith Bingham.
No appearance by the Defendant: James C. Mueller.
9:25 a.m. Plaintiff's witness: Edward Bingham Jr., was sworn and direct examined by counsel.
Exhibit 1- Lease agreement dtd. 9-6-03-----------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2- Three day notice dtd. 7-13-04---------------ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for restitution and possession of the premises at: 165 Peralta Ave., #2, San Francisco.
Damages $2,888.00
Attoeney's Fees of $600.00
Costs $188.30
Rental agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits.
Judgment signed in open court.
